name: CI/CD Pipeline Security Audit
description: Automated security audit workflow for CI/CD pipeline configurations. Monitors for suspicious changes to pipeline files (Jenkinsfile, .github/workflows, .gitlab-ci.yml), audits pipeline permissions for least-privilege violations, and detects potential tampering or injection attacks in the build process.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: GitHub
required_integrations.reason: Monitor and audit CI/CD workflow file changes and repository permissions

required_integrations.name: Slack
required_integrations.reason: Alert security and DevOps teams about suspicious pipeline modifications

required_integrations.name: Jira
required_integrations.reason: Create audit tickets for pipeline security findings

data.title: Pipeline Configuration Changed
data.summary: Triggers when CI/CD pipeline files are modified or pipeline permissions change

config.description: Monitors changes to CI/CD configuration files (Jenkinsfile, .github/workflows/*.yml, .gitlab-ci.yml, Dockerfile, docker-compose.yml)

data.title: AI Pipeline Security Analysis
data.summary: Riggs AI audits the pipeline change for security risks and tampering

config.additional_instructions: Audit the CI/CD pipeline configuration change: check for overly broad permissions (write-all, admin), use of untrusted third-party actions, secret exfiltration patterns, script injection via user-controlled inputs, self-hosted runner abuse risk, lack of pinned action versions (using @main instead of SHA), and privilege escalation in the build environment.
config.description: AI-powered CI/CD pipeline security audit for tampering and permission violations

data.title: Tampering or Injection Detected?
data.summary: Check if the AI detected signs of pipeline tampering or injection

data.title: Block Pipeline & Alert
data.summary: Block the pipeline change and alert the security team

data.title: Create Security Incident Ticket
data.summary: Create a Jira incident ticket for the pipeline tampering

config.description: Create a security incident ticket for pipeline tampering

data.title: Permission Violations?
data.summary: Check if the pipeline has least-privilege permission violations

data.title: Create Audit Ticket
data.summary: Create a Jira ticket for pipeline permission audit findings

config.description: Create a ticket for pipeline permission violations

data.title: Notify DevOps Team
data.summary: Notify the DevOps team about pipeline permission findings

data.title: Approve — Clean Audit
data.summary: Pipeline change passed security audit with no findings

config.note: CI/CD pipeline configuration change passed security audit. No tampering, injection risks, or permission violations detected.
